_meta.description: Deep follow-up suggestions for document intelligence flows.

suggestions.text: Check whether the same amount appears in another section or period.
suggestions.query: Show the same amount in the adjacent period from {{document}}.

suggestions.text: Verifique se o mesmo valor aparece em outro periodo.
suggestions.query: Mostre esse valor no periodo anterior em {{document}}.

suggestions.text: Compare this metric with a peer document and flag only material differences.
suggestions.query: Compare {{document}} with {{otherDocument}} for the same metric.

suggestions.text: Compare com outro documento e destaque apenas diferencias materiais.
Show context around this section to validate interpretation.
suggestions.query: Show 2 sections above and below where this appears in {{document}}.

suggestions.text: Mostre o contexto desta secao para validar a interpretacao.
suggestions.query: Mostre 2 secoes acima e abaixo da secao em {{document}}.

suggestions.text: Verifica si el mismo valor aparece en otra seccion o periodo.
suggestions.query: Muestra ese valor en el periodo anterior en {{document}}.

suggestions.text: Compara esta metrica con otro documento y resalta solo diferencias materiales.
suggestions.query: Compara {{document}} con {{otherDocument}} para la misma metrica.

suggestions.text: Muestra contexto alrededor de esta seccion para validar la interpretacion.
suggestions.query: Muestra 2 secciones arriba y abajo de la seccion en {{document}}.

suggestions.text: Break this summary down by section to see which areas drive the conclusion.
suggestions.query: Break down the summary of {{document}} by section.

suggestions.text: Detalhe este resumo por secao para ver quais areas sustentam a conclusao.
suggestions.query: Detalhe o resumo de {{document}} por secao.

suggestions.text: Desglosa este resumen por seccion para ver que areas sustentan la conclusion.
suggestions.query: Desglosa el resumen de {{document}} por seccion.

rules.trigger: no follow-up suggestions are generated after extraction answer
compare follow-up suggestion missing document context
single-doc extraction has no context expansion suggestion
rules.check: context.queryScope == 'singleDoc' AND output.followupSuggestions.any(s => s.id IN ['FS_005_expand_source_context','FS_006_expand_source_context_pt','FS_009_expand_source_context_es']) == false

rules.trigger: query language mismatches follow-up suggestion language
rules.check: (context.userLanguage == 'pt' AND output.followupSuggestions.any(s => s.language != 'pt')) OR (context.userLanguage == 'es' AND output.followupSuggestions.any(s => s.language != 'es'))

rules.trigger: follow-up suggestion count exceeds policy limit

templates.text: Use machine-actionable policy fallback when a specific template is missing in followup_suggestions.
